info.description: Standalone landing pages built from raw HTML — for competitions, influencer collabs, one-off campaigns. Renders inside a sandboxed iframe so pasted HTML/CSS/JS just works without touching the rest of the site.

title.description: Public page title. Shown in the browser tab and on social shares.

slug.description: URL path after /campaigns/. Lowercase, hyphens-not-spaces (e.g. 'feral-and-free' becomes /campaigns/feral-and-free). Auto-fills from title — only edit if you want to change the URL.

raw_html.description: Paste the ENTIRE HTML file here (from <!DOCTYPE html> all the way to </html>, or just the body if you prefer). It renders in a fully sandboxed iframe, so your CSS won't clash with the site's styles and your form/script tags DO run. Update this field to update the live page — save and it's live in seconds.

iframe_height.description: Height of the iframe on the page. 'auto' (default) grows to fit the content. Or set a fixed value like '900px', '100vh', '1400px'. Use 'auto' unless the page mis-sizes on mobile.

show_site_nav.description: Tick to show the standard Anna Lou Wellness nav at the top of the page. Untick for a bare, distraction-free landing (recommended for competitions and paid ads).

hero_image.description: Social share image (Facebook, Twitter, WhatsApp preview). 1200×630 landscape. Optional but recommended — makes the link look inviting when someone shares it.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page title.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and social previews (~155 chars). Fills in automatically when you Save — leave blank unless you want to override.
